title: Kursk: Drone incoming
title_en: Kursk: Drone incoming
description: 56 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of May 8 (from 18:00 on May 7), the enemy attacked 67 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and parody drones from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk, Millerovo - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and unmanned aerial vehicles...
description_en: 56 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of May 8 (from 18:00 on May 7), the enemy attacked 67 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and parody drones from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk, Millerovo - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, electronic warfare units and unmanned aerial vehicles...

Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних...

title: Attack attack
title_en: Attack attack
description: In Russia, the "truce" began with fires in Rostov and flew to Yaroslavl through the refinery. According to ASTRA, after the fires in Rostov, a fire broke out in the area of ​​the Western Promuzla. In particular, the Empils factory is located there, one of the largest chemical and paint factories. And in Yaroslavl, the refinery "Slavneft-YANOS" is on fire. This is not the first time that this plant has come under attack - the previous time was at the end of April.
description_en: In Russia, the "truce" began with fires in Rostov and flew to Yaroslavl through the refinery. According to ASTRA, after the fires in Rostov, a fire broke out in the area of ​​the Western Promuzla. In particular, the Empils factory is located there, one of the largest chemical and paint factories. And in Yaroslavl, the refinery "Slavneft-YANOS" is on fire. This is not the first time that this plant has come under attack - the previous time was at the end of April.
description_uk: В россии «перемирие» началось с пожаров в ростове и прилетов по НПЗ в ярославле По данным ASTRA, после ударов в ростове пожар вспыхнул в районе западного промузла. Там расположен, в частности, завод «Эмпилс» — один из крупнейших химических и лакокрасочных заводов. А в Ярославле горит НПЗ «Славнефть-ЯНОС». Этот завод уже не впервые попадает под атаку — предыдущий раз был в конце апреля.

description: Ukraine reportedly launches dozens of drones at Moscow ahead of Victory Day Parade. Moscow Mayor Sergey Sobyanin claimed that Ukraine's military launched dozens of drones towards the Russian capital throughout the night on May 8, just one day before Moscow is set to stage its annual Victory Day military parade.
description_en: Ukraine reportedly launches dozens of drones at Moscow ahead of Victory Day Parade. Moscow Mayor Sergey Sobyanin claimed that Ukraine's military launched dozens of drones towards the Russian capital throughout the night on May 8, just one day before Moscow is set to stage its annual Victory Day military parade.

title: Kyiv: Attack attack on infrastructure
title_en: Kyiv: Attack attack on infrastructure
description: Ukraine's military reportedly strikes Russian oil refinery, defense technology center. Ukrainian forces reportedly launched an attack on critical Russian military-industrial sites overnight on May 8, striking an oil refinery as well as the branch of a defense technology center, Russian Telegram media channels reported.

description: ‘We don’t recommend’ — Zelensky warns foreign officials against attending Russia’s Victory Day parade. “(Russia) wants permission from Ukraine to hold their parade, so they can safely march onto the square for one hour once a year, and then go back to killing our people and waging war again,” President Volodymyr Zelensky said.

description: ‘Emergency situation’ — Massive forest fire burns near Ukraine’s border as Russian drones block access. A 2,400-hectare forest fire is burning in Chernihiv Oblast near the Russian border, where emergency crews say Russian FPV drones are preventing full access to the area. Photo: Ukraine’s Northern Forest Office/Facebook.

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
description: 👀 In Ukraine, the Shahedov jet interceptor with a speed of up to 320 km/h was presented - Army Recognition At the SAHA 2026 exhibition, the Ukrainian Chaklun drone interceptor, which is already used against Russian UAVs, was shown. The drone is equipped with a turbojet engine, develops a speed of up to 320 km/h and can operate at an altitude of up to 6 km. Its range is up to 30 km when working together with RADA class radars....
description_en: 👀 In Ukraine, the Shahedov jet interceptor with a speed of up to 320 km/h was presented - Army Recognition At the SAHA 2026 exhibition, the Ukrainian Chaklun drone interceptor, which is already used against Russian UAVs, was shown. The drone is equipped with a turbojet engine, develops a speed of up to 320 km/h and can operate at an altitude of up to 6 km. Its range is up to 30 km when working together with RADA class radars....
description_uk: 👀 В Украине представили реактивный перехватчик "Шахедов" со скоростью до 320 км/ч, - Army Recognition На выставке SAHA 2026 показали украинский дрон-перехватчик "Чаклун", который уже используют против российских БПЛА. Беспилотник оснащен турбореактивным двигателем, развивает скорость до 320 км/ч и может работать на высоте до 6 км. Его дальность - до 30 км при работе вместе с радарами класса RADA....

description: Since the beginning of this era, the Russian army has been attacking Ukraine in all forms: strike drones, missile strikes, shelling and assaults on the front, use of aerial bombs. Only in the time between the beginning of the day and the morning there were already about 100 attack drones, dozens of assaults on key areas of the front, as well as dozens of airstrikes. Significant damage to civilian objects was recorded in Kharkiv Oblast, Sumy Oblast,...

description_uk: Від початку цієї доби російська армія завдає ударів по Україні в усіх формах: ударні дрони, ракетні удари, обстріли та штурми на фронті, застосування авіаційних бомб. Лише за час від початку доби і на ранок було вже близько 100 ударних дронів, десятки штурмових дій на ключових напрямках фронту, а також десятки авіаударів. title: 😳 Two drones from Russia flew into Latvia, one crashed into an oil...
title_en: 😳 Two drones from Russia flew into Latvia, one crashed into an oil...
title_uk: 😳 Два безпілотники з Росії залетіли в Латвію, один впав на нафтову...
description: 😳 Two drones from Russia flew into Latvia, one crashed into an oil tank, - local media. According to reports, the drones fell in the Latgale region. One of the drones was found near an oil storage facility in the city of Rezekne, approximately 40 km from the Russian border. According to local media, he crashed into an empty oil tank. There was no fire, but the rescuers had to cool the container. Second...
description_en: 😳 Two drones from Russia flew into Latvia, one crashed into an oil tank, - local media. According to reports, the drones fell in the Latgale region. One of the drones was found near an oil storage facility in the city of Rezekne, approximately 40 km from the Russian border. According to local media, he crashed into an empty oil tank. There was no fire, but the rescuers had to cool the container. Second...
description_uk: 😳 Два дрона со стороны россии залетели в Латвию, один врезался в нефтяной резервуар, - местные СМИ Как сообщается, беспилотники упали в регионе Латгалия. Один из дронов нашли рядом с нефтехранилищем в городе Резекне примерно в 40 км от российской границы. По данным местных СМИ, он врезался в пустой нефтяной резервуар. Возгорания не произошло, однако спасателям пришлось охлаждать емкость. Второй...
